events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. The vacuum decay test failing to hold at target microns is direct evidence of a leak or incomplete moisture/air removal in the brazed joints — non-compliant with ACCA Standard 5 evacuation criteria, manufacturer specs, and EPA 608 leak-tightness requirements. System must not be charged; leak detection, joint rework, and re-evacuation/retest are required before proceeding.
